title: The Number of Muslims at Badr
description: According to Abu Ja'far (al-Tabarl): The Messenger of God went out, as I have been informed by authorities other than Ibn Ishaq, on 3 Ramadan (February 28, 624) at the head of over three hundred and ten of his companions. There is a difference of opinion as

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
